Traphase patch:
----------------
Mechanic
----------------
Entwined:
It no longer goes away after the target uses a card and instead at the end of their turn but no longer stackable, deal double damage when using card that apply entwine (i.e. Agrippa Entwined Silk, deal 5 dmg and entwined, if target is already inflicted with entwined, do 10 dmg instead.)

Falter:
Next damage taken is now 50% instead of 25%.

----------------
Awakener (Guardian)
----------------
Erica:
--> Mechanical Barrier
-Cost is now 2 instead of 1 


Aigis:
--> Weakness Gaze
-Nerf, dmg is now 12 from 15

--> Exalt: Eye of Eternity
-Nerf, dmg is now 15 from 20


Ogier:
--> Frontline Tactics
-Cost is now 3 instead of 2 
-Effect change, 8 damage and x3 damage (24 dmg) if target is affected by Taunt, still inflict taunt when not.
--> Exalt: Seven Arts and Virtues
-Nerf, damage and shield to front-row target is now 25 instead of 35.


Alva:
--> Defensive Stance
-Effect change, from 20 shield and aliemus to 20 shield and 3 charge.

--> Insight Strike
-Nerf, dmg lowered from 10 to 8.

Agrippa:
--> Entwined Silk
-Now deal 5 dmg and entwined.
--> Web Strangled
-Now deal 3x3 dmg randomly and entwined.


Castor:
--> Onyx Plume
-Effect change, no longer considered as "Strike" instead now deal 12 dmg to front-row enemy and gain equal amount of Aliemus, gain 1 stack of barrier.


--> Oath of Protection
-Cost is now 4 instead of 3.
-Effect change, no longer grants all allies 1 barrier instead give 1 amplification to all allies.

--> Exalt: Dirge of the Unbroken
-Effect change, instead of giving self 40 shield now grants amplification+2


Wanda:
--> Wall of Corpses
-Effect change, add 3 temporary counter effect and remove draw a card.

--> Lost Dream's Guide
-Temporary counter reduced from 7 to 6

--> Exalt: Necropolis of Dreams
-Buff, now deal 3 random instance of 12 dmg instead of 10.

Is dev hq on fire? Wobbly and incomplete patch notes. Hope everything is fine.

[Battle]
● The effects of "Aliemus Absorb" applied by the enemy's "Transcendent Gaze" and "Find the Answer Within" are now uniformly described as "Void".
● The battle sound effects for Awakeners "Ramona," "Ogier," "Doll," and "Lotan" have been optimized, performing better at 2x speed.
● The Gnosis Rouse icon for Awakener details has been adjusted and no longer includes text, displaying correctly across all language settings.

[Traphase]
● Mechanic "Entwined" and "Falter" reworked, Awakener "Castor" and "Kathigu-Ra" reworked.
● The values or effects of many other cards have also changed. For details, please confirm in the game after the update.
